# OSUpdateStatusCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to get the status of operating-system updates on a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object OSUpdateStatusCommand
```

## Objects

- **OSUpdateStatusCommand.Command**: The command to get the status of operating-system updates on a device.

## Commands and responses

- **OSUpdateStatusResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to get the status of operating-system updates on a device.
